title: Blackberry Treat
description: A sweet and tangy dessert to satisfy your cravings. Made with fresh blackberries and a hint of tanginess.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, puree the blackberries until smooth.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the sugar, flour, and lemon juice.
Add the egg and melted butter to the sugar mixture. Mix until well combined.
Pour the blackberry puree into the sugar mixture and mix until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are set.
Allow the treat to cool completely before serving.
Serve warm or chilled, garnished with additional blackberries if desired.
